title.en: Ye Tian's body began to reshape with a new part...

content.en:
Ye Tian has gone through countless attempts, starting from Xing without any results, to slowly achieving results, once he has results, he will enter the sea of gray mist and fire to verify, so as to find out the defects of his particle structure.

Therefore, the research of 300,000 eternal years has finally allowed him to modify his particle structure to the most stable degree.

this day.

Ye Tian's body began to reshape with a new particle structure.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's body turned into countless wills, innate eternal rules, and countless body particles, and immediately began to reorganize again, and the reorganization must be completed in a short period of time, otherwise the body's self-healing and recovery ability will forcibly restore the body structure to its previous level.

In an instant, the particle structure is reshaped.

Ye Tian's body remodeling was completed, and a large amount of origin energy began to stabilize this nascent reshaped body.

"The reshaping of my body is complete, and my physical strength has not improved much, but my body structure has stabilized ten times billion"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before, he had always thought that his body was perfect, but after going through the sea of gray mist and fire, he realized that there was a more perfect body structure.

If he hadn't encountered the sea of gray mist and fire, he wouldn't have thought about reshaping his body. 08

It can be said that this time the gray mist stone statue chance made him truly complete a transformation.

"Let's try to see if we can cross the sea of gray fog and fire"

Ye Tian walked into the sea of gray mist and fire, and endless flames poured into his body, wanting to disintegrate his body.

Although Ye Tian's body was weak, the structure of the eternal particles was extremely stable, so he resisted it stubbornly.

He kept moving forward, attracting the attention of many Transcendental Legendary Lords.

"What, the Endless Lord is still advancing in the Sea of Gray Mist and Fire, how did he hold on?"

They were stunned.

Before, Ye Tian had also entered the sea of gray mist and fire, but they all came out quickly, but this time they kept advancing.

And they didn't dare to do this, otherwise they wouldn't be able to withstand the flames, and their bodies would collapse directly, causing this doppelganger to fall.

When Ye Tian walked half the distance of the Gray Mist and Fire Sea, the Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords present didn't know what to say.

If Ye Tian passed through the Gray Mist and Fire Sea, but their group of Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords couldn't, wouldn't it be too embarrassing?

After another while, Ye Tian was already about to pass through the sea of gray mist and fire, although his body was already full of cracks, and it seemed that it was about to collapse, but the particle structure of his body was too stable, so it was still very early before the real collapse.

Finally, the sea of gray mist and fire was gone, and Ye Tian crossed the sea of gray mist and fire.

At the other end of the Grey Mist and Fire Sea, the subgroup of Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords was envious, and at the same time, they also didn't understand that Dantian, the Realm Legendary Lords who had just broken through, should be inferior to them in terms of cultivation, will, and mastery of the Eternal Dao, why they were able to cross the Grey Mist and Fire Sea, but they couldn't.

Could it be that Zuo Wuhuo Hai deliberately took care of Ye Tian, but this is unlikely!

Ye Tian had just crossed the sea of gray mist and fire, and a reward was in hand.

This reward is somewhat special, it comes in a bottle with a piece of blood tissue inside.

And this bottle is not simple, Ye Tian can't see any materials, but when he pinches it hard, it is like an ordinary person pinching a glass bottle, and he can't pinch it at all.

"Maybe it's a bottle made by the Eternal Master. "

Ye Tian guessed.

The purpose of this bottle is to carry that piece of blood tissue, or to act as a seal.

Therefore, if he can really break the bottle, Ye Tian will not do it.

Immediately, Ye Tian spread with his will, and the bottle did not block Ye Tian's will.

As a result, Ye Tian's will touched the piece of blood tissue.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying aura erupted from that blood tissue, almost inflicting a heavy blow on Ye Tian's will.

Immediately, Ye Tian's will withdrew from the bottle, and his face was slightly pale.

"What kind of creature is this, so terrifying!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

But soon, he was excited.

Because this creature's blood tissue was alive and contained the body structure of that creature, just by looking at it for a moment, Ye Tian could judge that the creature's body was far beyond the Legendary Realm Lord, and its body was definitely beyond the realm of the eternal body.

The most important thing in this step from the Realm Realm Legendary Lord to the Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord is detachment, not only the detachment of the Will Rule Realm, but also the physical detachment to reach the point of the Will Rule Heaven and Earth.

How does the body detach?

Then it must be promoted from the Eternal Body, and the Eight Extremes Realm powerhouse in the half-step Eternal Realm has already raised the Eternal Body to the Transcendent Realm, but that is the division and noun of the Source Sea.

And in the immeasurable sea, the detachment of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm refers to the category of transcending the eternal body, which is no longer an eternal body in itself, but a realm above the eternal body

These two types of detachment have different meanings.

In the Immeasurable Sea, the physical constitution of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm is called the Legendary Body.

The legendary body is a physique that is above the eternal body, which belongs to the legend, and it is a realm that the ordinary legendary realm cannot cross, beyond the eternal body, so it is called the meaning of detachment.

Of course, the body of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm is not a real Legendary Body, but only has the characteristics of a Legendary Body.

The legendary body coupled with the will rule heaven and earth is the true sign of the legendary lord of the transcendent realm.

And the 117 creatures to which the blood tissue in Ye Tian's hand belonged, its body was a legendary body, and it was not an ordinary legendary body, but the top legendary body, which could be called a supreme legendary body.

In the Infinite Sea, the Supreme Legendary Body also belongs to the Legendary Body, and the bodies of many Legendary Realm Lords are not the Supreme Legendary Body, and they can't even see the Supreme Legendary Body.

And now, Ye Tian has obtained the blood tissue of the supreme legendary body.

"The strongest Legendary Creatures are invincible among the Lords of the Legendary Realm, and only the Eternal Masters can kill them. Ye Tian said darkly.

He put the bottle away and moved on.

As for the study of the Xeon Legend, this is not the place to study.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the next level.

Here, all those Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land were stopped, and none of them passed.

And Ye Tian's arrival also made them all dumbfounded.

"Endless Lord, you have passed through the Grey Mist and Fire !!"

The Frostless Lord said incredulously.

She can be regarded as watching Ye Tian grow up all the way from the Origin Realm Legendary Lord, and now that she has been promoted to the Realm Realm Legendary Lord, the speed is just fast, how can she still break through the sea of gray mist and fire?

Those half-step Legendary Realm Lords were all stopped for a while, and they were still seriously injured.

And Ye Tian's strength is many times worse than that of the half-step Legendary Realm!_
